name: gutenberg-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Project Gutenberg — 75,000+ public-domain ebooks, searchable with full plain-text retrieval.

interface.shortDescription: MCP server for Project Gutenberg — 75,000+ public-domain ebooks, searchable with full plain-text retrieval.
interface.longDescription: Access 75,000+ public-domain books from Project Gutenberg. Search by title, author, language, topic, or popularity. Retrieve full plain text with offset/limit chunking for context-budget management. No API key required.
